title: net-snmp security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.9.1-17.0.1.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 35010262]

[1:5.9.1-17.1]
- fix out of bound access issue (RHEL-137510)
- enable PQC (RHEL-132653)
full_text:
[5.9.1-17.0.1.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 35010262]

[1:5.9.1-17.1]
- fix out of bound access issue (RHEL-137510)
- enable PQC (RHEL-132653)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0696.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-68615.html
